creator: minotaur@crete.org.ua
text:
It is unable to build graphics/libGL from ports tree updated last night:

/usr/ports/graphics/libGL>make
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Extracting for libGL-7.4.4
[...]
===>  Building for libGL-7.4.4

Making sources for autoconf

touch depend
